description: A vertical graphic on a light gray background showing a smartphone displaying a mock mobile boarding pass headed CBP Home, MOBILE BOARDING PASS, with a world-map graphic and a stylized airplane between the labels USA and HOME. A red band on the pass reads FREE FLIGHT + $2,600 EXIT BONUS, above the Department of Homeland Security seal and the text DHS.GOV/CBPHOME. Blue and red text at the top reads Go home today.
notable_text: Go home today; CBP Home; MOBILE BOARDING PASS; USA; HOME; FREE FLIGHT + $2,600 EXIT BONUS; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
